# IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode

**Enumeration**

These constants specify the transfer mode used by the camera view. These constants are used by [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceView/mode].

## Declaration

```swift
@frozen enum IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode
```

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.fileBased**: Transferred files will be saved to disk by the delegate.
- **IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode.memoryBased**: Transferred files will be supplied to the delegate as an `NSData` object.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode**: These constants specify the display mode used by the camera view. These constants are used by [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceView/mode].

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
